mapper.sql: SELECT P.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , PAGING.* FROM (
mapper.select:
SELECT A.TMPLET_ID, A.TMPLET_NM, B.MAIN_KEY, B.EST_EXPL, B.USE_YN, A.DEL_ABL_YN, CASE WHEN B.SYNC_LAST_DATE IS NULL AND C.SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN NVL(C.SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE, B.SYNC_LAST_DATE-1) > NVL(B.SYNC_LAST_DATE, C.SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE-1) THEN TO_CHAR(C.SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') ELSE TO_CHAR(B.SYNC_LAST_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') END SYNC_LAST_DATE, CASE WHEN B.SYNC_LAST_DATE IS NULL AND C.SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN NVL(D.SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE, B.SYNC_LAST_DATE-1) > NVL(B.SYNC_LAST_DATE, D.SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE-1) THEN (SELECT NVL(MAX(USER_NM),'manual') FROM AD_USER_MST WHERE USER_ID = D.SYNC_RQS_USER_ID) ELSE (SELECT NVL(MAX(USER_NM),'manual') FROM AD_USER_MST WHERE USER_ID = B.LAST_SYNC_RQS_USER_ID) END SYNC_RQS_USER_NM, ( ( SELECT count(*) FROM PM_CONFIG_SUBKEY_MAP subMap WHERE subMap.MAIN_KEY = B.MAIN_KEY AND (subMap.SUB_VAL != subMap.SYNC_SUB_VAL OR subMap.SYNC_SUB_VAL IS NULL) ) + ( SELECT count(*) FROM PM_TMPLET_SUBKEY_MAP keyMap , PM_TMPLET_SUBVAL_MAP valMap , PM_CONFIG_DTS conf WHERE conf.MAIN_KEY = B.MAIN_KEY AND keyMap.TMPLET_ID = conf.TMPLET_ID AND valMap.TMPLET_ID = conf.TMPLET_ID AND valMap.SUB_KEY = keyMap.SUB_KEY AND keyMap.SUB_KEY NOT IN ( SELECT SUB_KEY FROM PM_CONFIG_SUBKEY_MAP confSub WHERE confSub.MAIN_KEY=B.MAIN_KEY) AND (valMap.SUB_VAL != valMap.SYNC_SUB_VAL OR keyMap.SYNC_SUB_VAL_SEQ IS NULL) ) ) SYNC_PRG_STS_NM, TO_CHAR(B.STM_FIR_REG_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') STM_FIR_REG_DATE, B.STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID, (SELECT NVL(MAX(C.USER_NM),'manual') FROM AD_USER_MST C WHERE C.USER_ID = B.STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID) STM_FIR_REG_USER_NM, TO_CHAR(B.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, B.STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID, (SELECT NVL(MAX(D.USER_NM),'manual') FROM AD_USER_MST D WHERE D.USER_ID = B.STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID) STM_LAST_UPD_USER_NM FROM PM_TMPLET_MST A, PM_CONFIG_DTS B, (SELECT * FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS WHERE (TMPLET_ID, SYNC_SEQ) IN (SELECT TMPLET_ID, max(SYNC_SEQ) AS SYNC_SEQ FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS WHERE 1=1 AND SYNC_PRG_STS_CD = '02' GROUP BY TMPLET_ID)) C, (SELECT * FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS WHERE (TMPLET_ID, SYNC_SEQ) IN (SELECT TMPLET_ID, max(SYNC_SEQ) AS SYNC_SEQ FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY TMPLET_ID)) D WHERE 1=1 AND A.TMPLET_ID = B.TMPLET_ID AND A.TMPLET_ID = C.TMPLET_ID(+) AND A.TMPLET_ID = D.TMPLET_ID(+)
AND A.TMPLET_ID = '1'
AND A.TMPLET_ID != '1'
AND LOWER(A.TMPLET_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{tmpletNm})||'%'
AND LOWER(B.MAIN_KEY) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{mainKey})||'%'
AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY B.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE DESC
#{endRow}
#{startRow}

SELECT count(*) total FROM PM_TMPLET_MST A, PM_CONFIG_DTS B, (SELECT * FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS WHERE (TMPLET_ID, SYNC_SEQ) IN (SELECT TMPLET_ID, max(SYNC_SEQ) AS SYNC_SEQ FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS WHERE 1=1 AND SYNC_PRG_STS_CD = '02' GROUP BY TMPLET_ID)) C, (SELECT * FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS WHERE (TMPLET_ID, SYNC_SEQ) IN (SELECT TMPLET_ID, max(SYNC_SEQ) AS SYNC_SEQ FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY TMPLET_ID)) D WHERE 1=1 AND A.TMPLET_ID = B.TMPLET_ID AND A.TMPLET_ID = C.TMPLET_ID(+) AND A.TMPLET_ID = D.TMPLET_ID(+)
AND A.TMPLET_ID = '1'
AND A.TMPLET_ID != '1'
AND LOWER(A.TMPLET_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{tmpletNm})||'%'
AND LOWER(B.MAIN_KEY) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{mainKey})||'%'
AND A.DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT a.TMPLET_ID, a.TMPlET_NM FROM PM_TMPLET_MST a WHERE 1=1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND TMPLET_ID != '1' ORDER BY TMPLET_NM
SELECT SUBSTR(XMLAGG ( XMLELEMENT ( COL, ', ', MAIN_KEY) ORDER BY MAIN_KEY ).EXTRACT('//text()').GETSTRINGVAL() ,3) AS autoKeys FROM PM_STB_RQS_MAINKEY_DTS WHERE 1=1 AND STB_ID = #{mainKey}

WITH VAL_LIST AS ( SELECT distinct sub_key, SUBSTR( XMLAGG ( XMLELEMENT ( COL, ';', sub_val || ':' || sub_val) ORDER BY sub_val_seq ).EXTRACT('//text()').GETSTRINGVAL() , 2) bas_val FROM pm_tmplet_subval_map WHERE 1=1 AND tmplet_id = #{tmpletId} GROUP BY sub_key ) SELECT b.sub_key, b.sub_val_typ_cd, c.sub_val, b.sub_val_seq, d.bas_val, b.sub_expl FROM pm_tmplet_mst a, pm_tmplet_subkey_map b, pm_tmplet_subval_map c, VAL_LIST d WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.tmplet_id = b.tmplet_id AND a.tmplet_id = c.tmplet_id AND b.sub_key = c.sub_key (+) AND b.SUB_KEY = d.SUB_KEY AND b.sub_val_seq = c.sub_val_seq (+) AND a.del_yn = 'N' AND b.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.tmplet_id = #{tmpletId}

--- Configuration 상세 WITH target AS ( SELECT A.TMPLET_ID, B.MAIN_KEY, A.SUB_KEY, A.SUB_VAL_TYP_CD, A.SUB_VAL_SEQ, NVL(B.SUB_VAL, A.SUB_VAL) AS SUB_VAL, CASE WHEN B.SUB_VAL IS NULL THEN A.SYNC_SUB_VAL ELSE B.SYNC_SUB_VAL END SYNC_SUB_VAL, a.SUB_EXPL, CASE WHEN B.sub_val IS NULL THEN 'T' ELSE 'C' END VAL_FLAG FROM ( SELECT a.TMPLET_ID, b.SUB_KEY, ( SELECT SUB_VAL FROM PM_TMPLET_SUBVAL_MAP WHERE TMPLET_ID = #{tmpletId} AND SUB_KEY = B.SUB_KEY AND SUB_VAL_SEQ = B.SUB_VAL_SEQ ) SUB_VAL, ( SELECT SYNC_SUB_VAL FROM PM_TMPLET_SUBVAL_MAP WHERE TMPLET_ID = #{tmpletId} AND SUB_KEY = B.SUB_KEY AND SUB_VAL_SEQ = B.SYNC_SUB_VAL_SEQ ) SYNC_SUB_VAL, a.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, b.SUB_VAL_TYP_CD, b.SUB_VAL_SEQ, b.SUB_EXPL FROM PM_TMPLET_MST A, PM_TMPLET_SUBKEY_MAP B WHERE A.TMPLET_ID = B.TMPLET_ID AND A.TMPLET_ID = #{tmpletId} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ) A, ( SELECT A.TMPLET_ID, A.MAIN_KEY, B.SUB_KEY, B.SUB_VAL, B.SYNC_SUB_VAL, B.USE_YN, B.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE FROM PM_CONFIG_DTS A, PM_CONFIG_SUBKEY_MAP B WHERE A.MAIN_KEY = B.MAIN_KEY (+) AND A.MAIN_KEY = #{mainKey} ) B WHERE A.TMPLET_ID = B.TMPLET_ID(+) AND A.SUB_KEY = B.SUB_KEY(+) AND (B.USE_YN IS NULL OR B.USE_YN = 'Y') ) , val_list AS ( SELECT distinct sub_key, SUBSTR(XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT ( COL, ';', sub_val || ':' || sub_val) ORDER BY sub_val_seq ) .EXTRACT('//text()').GETSTRINGVAL(), 2) bas_val FROM pm_tmplet_subval_map WHERE 1=1 AND TMPLET_ID = #{tmpletId} GROUP BY sub_key ) SELECT NVL(a.main_key,#{mainKey}) MAIN_KEY, a.tmplet_id, a.sub_key, a.sub_val_typ_cd, a.sub_val, a.sub_val_seq, a.sync_sub_val, b.bas_val, a.sub_expl, a.val_flag FROM target a, val_list b WHERE 1=1 AND a.SUB_KEY = b.SUB_KEY AND a.tmplet_id = #{tmpletId} ORDER BY a.sub_key ASC

SELECT SUB_KEY AS SUB_KEY_NM, SUB_VAL AS SUB_KEY_VALUE, STM_FIR_REG_DATE AS SUBVAL_UPD_DATE, STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID AS SUBVAL_UPD_USER FROM PM_CONFIG_SUBKEY_HST WHERE SUB_KEY = #{subkeyNm} and MAIN_KEY = #{mainkeyNm} ORDER BY SUBVAL_UPD_DATE DESC

SELECT MAIN_KEY AS mainkeyNm , max(STM_FIR_REG_DATE) AS subvalUpdDate , max(STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID) AS subvalUpdUser , LISTAGG(val, ' ') within group (order by val) subkeyValue FROM ( SELECT CONCAT (CONCAT(SUB_KEY,' : '),SUB_VAL) AS val , MAIN_KEY , STM_FIR_REG_DATE , STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID FROM PM_CONFIG_SUBKEY_HST WHERE DEL_YN = 'Y' ) hst GROUP BY MAIN_KEY ORDER BY subvalUpdDate DESC
